package.name: genie_sim_robot_model
package.description: Universal robot model abstraction layer for multi-robot xacro dispatch. Bundles vendor robot descriptions (Franka FR3, Universal Robots UR5, ARX, Aloha, AgiBot Genie G2, …) — each retains its upstream license; see THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES for per-robot terms (Apache-2.0, BSD-3-Clause, UR graphical-documentation T&Cs, …). The xacro dispatch layer itself is MPL-2.0.
